suggest.ext-pcntl: required if you want to use long-running watch loops.
suggest.ext-posix: required if you want to use permissions.
suggest.ext-simplexml: required if you want to use XML parsing.
suggest.ext-xmlreader: required if you want to use XML parsing.
suggest.ext-zip: required if you want to use compression.
suggest.league/flysystem-async-aws-s3: required for AsyncAWS S3 adapter support.
suggest.league/flysystem-aws-s3-v3: required for AWS S3 adapter support.
suggest.league/flysystem-azure-blob-storage: required for Azure Blob Storage adapter support.
suggest.league/flysystem-google-cloud-storage: required for Google Cloud Storage adapter support.
suggest.league/flysystem-gridfs: required for MongoDB GridFS adapter support.
suggest.league/flysystem-path-prefixing: required for path-prefixing adapter wrapper support.
suggest.league/flysystem-read-only: required for read-only adapter wrapper support.
